title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Milkbasket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Milkbasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
